message:
Fix HyperLogLog rho calculation to use sentinel bit instead of unconditional OR

- Place sentinel bit at position p-1 instead of unconditionally ORing
  it into the shifted hash, correctly bounding the maximum leading-zero
  run to 64-p bits and preventing rho overflow when the remaining
  bits are all zero

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
